allow: PowerShell($p = Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'"; if \($p\) { $p | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Measure-Object\).Count)
PowerShell($c = \(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | Measure-Object\).Count; "node procs: $c"; npm --prefix .\\node-backend run db:push)

PowerShell(Get-CimInstance Win32_Process -Filter "Name='node.exe'" | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; npm --prefix .\\node-backend run db:generate)
